## Summary

Describe the problem and the smallest change that solves it.

## Validation

- [ ] Python tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend tests and build pass when affected.
- [ ] Ruff and frontend lint pass.
- [ ] No secrets, model weights, private datasets, runtime state, or generated projects are included.
- [ ] Approval and filesystem safety gates remain enforced.

## Risk

List behavioral, security, migration, and compatibility risks, plus rollback steps.
